message:
feat(tui): add named theme registry, reservation snapshots, mouse dismiss, and word-wrap improvements

This is a large TUI feature batch covering theme infrastructure,
reservation data flow, mouse interaction polish, and rendering fixes.

Named theme palette system (T14.2/T14.3):
- Add a 5-theme named registry (Frankenstein, Solarized Dark, Dracula,
  Nord, Gruvbox Dark) with config names, display names, and atomic
  index-based cycling via init_named_theme/cycle_named_theme/set_named_theme.
- TuiThemePalette::current() now resolves from the active named theme
  index instead of querying the ftui theme ID, decoupling palette
  selection from the console-level theme layer.
- Add metric_reservations and metric_projects color tokens to all five
  palette variants for the new dashboard KPI tiles.
- Persist active_theme in TuiPreferences (envfile + JSON roundtrip)
  and broadcast it via TUI_THEME in the env map and state sync payload.
- Comprehensive test coverage: registry count, config-name-to-index
  roundtrip, cycle-wrap, set-by-index, invisible-fg-token guard,
  contrast ratio checks (selection, severity-on-panel, badge, TTL bands),
  color-distinctness checks (contact, activity-recency, metric-tile,
  text-hierarchy), and sub-millisecond cycling performance gate.

Reservation snapshot integration:
- Add ReservationSnapshot struct to tui_events with DB-derived fields
  (id, project_slug, agent_name, path_pattern, exclusive, granted_ts,
  expires_ts, released_ts) and is_released() helper.
- Add reservation_snapshots field to DbStatSnapshot and wire it through
  the poller (fetch_reservation_snapshots SQL query with JOIN on
  projects+agents tables, MAX_RESERVATIONS=1000 cap).
- SnapshotDelta gains reservation_snapshots_changed tracking, correctly
  counted in changed_count() and any_changed().
- ReservationsScreen now consumes DB snapshots via apply_db_snapshot()
  on each tick, replacing pure event-sourced state with authoritative
  DB rows. Event ingestion (ingest_events) returns a bool to drive
  conditional rebuild_sorted(), and the tick interval check drops from
  every-10th-tick to change-driven + fallback.
- ActiveReservation derives PartialEq+Eq for efficient diff detection.

Mouse interaction improvements:
- Help overlay click-outside-to-dismiss: extract help_overlay_rect()
  from render_help_overlay_sections() into a public function, add
  handle_help_overlay_mouse() to MailAppModel that checks pointer
  position against the overlay rect and dismisses on outside click
  or handles scroll-within. Help overlay mouse dispatch runs before
  shell-level dispatch to trap pointer events.
- Status line mouse zones: replace the blanket ToggleHelp on any
  status-line click with zone-based dispatch — left 14 columns for
  help toggle, right 18 columns for palette open, center forwards
  to screen. Add STATUS_HELP_ZONE_WIDTH and STATUS_PALETTE_ZONE_WIDTH
  constants.
- Compose modal click-outside-to-dismiss: extract compose_modal_rect()
  from render_compose_modal(), add mouse handling in compose event
  path that dismisses the modal on clicks outside the modal rect.
  Compose modal traps all pointer input while open.
- Shell-level mouse dispatch is now gated on !text_mode to prevent
  tab/status clicks from firing during compose or search input.
- Tests for all new mouse behaviors (overlay dismiss inside/outside,
  status zone dispatch, compose modal dismiss inside/outside).

Dashboard and rendering:
- Dashboard default verbosity changed from Standard to Verbose so
  health pulses (Trace-level) are hidden by default but one "v" press
  reveals them. Tests updated accordingly.
- Dashboard summary band gains "Locks" (file_reservations) and
  "Projects" tiles at all density levels, with adjusted KPI ordering:
  Messages > Ack Pend > Locks > Agents > Projects > Requests >
  Avg Lat > Uptime. Compact density: Msg > Locks > Req.
- Tool metrics latency ribbon severity colors now use theme palette
  tokens (tp.severity_ok/warn/error) instead of hardcoded RGB values.
- Message detail panel paragraphs gain word-wrap (WrapMode::Word) for
  both header and body sections, preventing horizontal overflow on
  narrow terminals.

Status line and chrome:
- segment_text_width() and cursor tracking in render_status_line()
  switch from byte-length (.len()) to display_width() for correct
  column math with Unicode content. Effect overlay label width
  calculation also uses display_width().

Bridge and WebSocket:
- REMOTE_TERMINAL_EVENT_QUEUE_CAPACITY raised from 1024 to 4096 and
  REMOTE_EVENTS_PER_TICK raised from 64 to 256 to handle bursty
  browser clients without dropping input events.
- events_since() switches from try_events_since_seq (fallible) to
  events_since_seq (infallible, returns empty vec on ring overflow).
- New bridge tests: large-duration clamping for sparkline, whitespace
  trimming in TransportBase::from_http_path, server control with live
  receiver, console_log_since with future seq.

WebSocket input/state:
- New tui_ws_input tests: empty body rejection, max batch boundary,
  alias form parsing (input+resize), ping-only payload handling.
- New tui_ws_state tests: invalid poll param fallback, limit lower-
  bound clamping, snapshot limit enforcement, delta without new events,
  delta limit + seq tracking.

Markdown rendering:
- Add snapshot_golden_regression_matrix test covering heading+bold,
  JSON code fence, hostile script sanitization, and nested list
  scenarios with deterministic FNV-1a digest verification.

Cargo.lock:
- Add frankensearch-embed and frankensearch-index dependencies to
  mcp-agent-mail-server.

Minor formatting:
- Rustfmt adjustments in lib.rs (line wrap in rate-limit test),
  tui_app.rs (clipboard set call), tui_theme.rs (assertion messages).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -333,9 +333,30 @@ pub struct DbStatSnapshot {
     pub agents_list: Vec<AgentSummary>,
     pub projects_list: Vec<ProjectSummary>,
     pub contacts_list: Vec<ContactSummary>,
+    pub reservation_snapshots: Vec<ReservationSnapshot>,
     pub timestamp_micros: i64,
 }
 
+/// Cached reservation metadata derived from the `file_reservations` table.
+#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq, Serialize, Deserialize)]
+pub struct ReservationSnapshot {
+    pub id: i64,
+    pub project_slug: String,
+    pub agent_name: String,
+    pub path_pattern: String,
+    pub exclusive: bool,
+    pub granted_ts: i64,
+    pub expires_ts: i64,
+    pub released_ts: Option<i64>,
+}
+
+impl ReservationSnapshot {
+    #[must_use]
+    pub const fn is_released(&self) -> bool {
+        self.released_ts.is_some()
+    }
+}
+
 #[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Serialize, Deserialize)]
 #[non_exhaustive]
 #[serde(tag = "kind", rename_all = "snake_case")]
